ProfileName: Crysis 3 Remastered FR v1.4 direct trainer

Cheats.Name: Lock Energy
Cheats.Description: Ported from the FR v1.4 EnergyLock flag. Keeps nanosuit energy from being consumed after the core hook is installed.

Cheats.Name: Lock Holster
Cheats.Description: Ported from the FR v1.4 bAmmoHolster flag. Keeps holster ammo, grenades, and arrows from being consumed normally.

Cheats.Name: Lock Clip (No Reload)
Cheats.Description: Ported from the FR v1.4 bAmmoClip flag. Skips clip ammo decrement for the No Reload behavior.

Cheats.Name: Lock Health
Cheats.Description: Ported from the FR v1.4 bHealthLock flag. Maintains the player health value used by the table's God Mode behavior.

Cheats.Name: 1-Hit Kill
Cheats.Description: Ported from the FR v1.4 bHealthKill flag. Clamps most enemy health values for fast kills.
